title: Military Footage Shows Alleged Star-Shaped UFO as Government Readies Second Batch of Files for Release
description: The Pentagon is set to release more UFO files following public and legislative pressure, with new footage sparking renewed interest in unexplained aerial phenomena.

title: Wild Theories Abound as New UFO Landing Site? Spotted Just Miles from Area 51
description: Despite Area 51's long-standing reputation as the center of alien lore and extraterrestrial autopsies, the CIA officially admitted its existence in 2013, announcing it as a remote US Air Force base in Nevada. However, the circular formation's resemblance to known bombing circles and aerial target ranges has led to theories suggesting a connection between the structure and UFO activity or classified government experiments.

title: Amy Shira Teitel Says Viral UFO Buzz Is Recasting Decades-Old Apollo Images as New Discoveries
description: As UFO speculation surges, space historian says many Apollo-era images now going viral have been publicly available for decades

title: Newly Declassified UFO Files Reveal Hundreds of Incidents from Cold War
description: The records include radar-tracking reports, focusing on military and intelligence messages about unknown objects spotted on screens worldwide during the Cold War. Reports include fighter jets chasing unidentified objects, sightings of star-shaped UFOs, and encounters with Soviet-made fighter aircraft.

title: Mysterious circular structure spotted near Area 51 sparks theories of UFO landing site
description: A strange circular formation just miles from the highly classified Area 51 base has fueled speculations that it could be a secret UFO landing site.
